name: Hot Mocha Coffee Mix
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Instant nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the instant nonfat dry milk powder, sugar, cocoa, instant coffee powder, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, and ground cloves.
2. Mix all ingredients well until evenly distributed.
3. Store the mix in an airtight container for later use.
4. To prepare one serving, add 2 tablespoons of the mix to a cup.
5. Pour 1 cup of boiling water into the cup with the mix and stir well until dissolved.
6. Enjoy your hot mocha coffee! (Yield: approximately 44 servings, each containing about 41 calories and 25 milligrams of sodium per serving)
